Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Further Responses From Deft To Req For Form Interrogatories Set 1 And Req.'S For Admissions, Set 1 And Req. For Sanctions Against Deft'S
Off Calendar Aug-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Kaitlin Anthony's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories and requests for admissions is granted in part and denied in part.
Requests for admissions
1
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken as 'date of loss' is defined and the request does not seek privileged information

3
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. The answer may be sufficient without referring to another response

4
Denied

10, 11, 13, 14
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken.

12, 15, 16
Denied. The objections are overruled and stricken. The answer is otherwise sufficient
Form interrogatories
Granted

Where the Court has ordered a further response, supplemental answers shall be provided within 15 days of notice of this order. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
